hero.title: Your body doesn't just live on Earth.
hero.subtitle: Learn to read its signals, protect your energy, and transform your health from the root. Everything vibrates. Everything influences. Everything can be transformed. The Biohacker's Guide teaches you to understand the energy of the Earth, your spaces, your food, and your thoughts to restore your natural balance.

books.subtitle: Each book is a deep dive into the invisible forces that shape your health and environment.

books.adventureSeriesSubtitle: Historical adventure fiction inspired by real expeditions and ancient enigmas.
books.adventureBook1Series: The Adventures of Caesar Maple — Book One
books.adventureBook1Title: The Lost Secret of Inca's Stones
books.adventureBook1Desc: London, 1926. Decorated RAF pilot Caesar Maple thinks he's traded dogfights for dusty archives — until a letter arrives with five unnerving words: "Beware the Keepers of Heads." What begins as a scholarly inquiry becomes a perilous trek from the British Museum to the knife-edged Andes and the uncharted lungs of the Amazon. Guided by clues that should not exist — stones that remember shape, glyphs where no glyphs belong, maps that align temples across continents — Maple and his fractured team race against ruthless rivals to uncover a technology capable of raising empires… or erasing them.
books.adventureBook1H1: Real expeditions and historical enigmas reimagined as adventure
books.adventureBook1H2: Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia: Machu Picchu, Nazca, Tiwanaku & beyond
books.adventureBook1H3: A secret technology — the lost art of ancient builders
books.adventureBook1H4: Perfect for fans of Indiana Jones, Dan Brown & Clive Cussler
